channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sunny Hostin calls US a 'failed experiment' on 'The View,' prompting White House criticism
item.description: Sunny Hostin expressed conflicted feelings about the country, calling it a failed experiment, which drew a rebuke from the White House.

item.title: Samurai, Cloisonné, Spiny Lobster, and a Sake Fountain Arrive in Dallas
item.description: A striking collaboration highlights the artistry of Japanese metalwork.

item.title: Hegseth links immigration and 'invasion' in D-Day speech in France
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth used a D-Day anniversary speech to draw parallels between immigration by sea and the wartime liberation of Europe.

item.title: How D-Day Helped Secure Religious Liberty
item.description: The heroism of June 6, 1944, safeguarded a freedom that enables all others.
